scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/providers && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run tauri build -w apps/desktop
scripts.release: npm run build:desktop && npm run sign -w apps/desktop
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/shared && npm run clean -w packages/providers && npm run clean -w packages/ui
